title: The Balloon Of The Mind
content:
Hands, do what you�re bid;
Bring the balloon of the mind
That bellies and drags in the wind
Into its narrow shed.
meaning:
"The Balloon Of The Mind" is a quintessential example of William Butler Yeats's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
